title: Grilled Roast Beef with Cucumber Salad
description: A simple and flavorful recipe featuring grilled roast beef paired with a refreshing cucumber salad.
instructions: Season the roast with salt, pepper, and argentinian roast (if using).
Grill the roast for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 63°C.
Let the roast rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Meanwhile, slice the cucumber into thin rounds.
In a small bowl, whisk together a vinaigrette of your choice.
To assemble the salad, arrange the sliced cucumber on a plate, top with sliced roast, and garnish with tender (if using).
Drizzle the vinaigrette over the salad and serve immediately.
